name: Sauteed Fennel, Radicchio, and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 fennel bulb, trimmed, and cut lengthwise into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch non-stick skillet, heat olive oil over moderately high heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Add pine nuts and sauté, stirring occasionally, until golden brown. Transfer the pine nuts to paper towels to drain.
3. Add garlic and cook until golden. Discard with a slotted spoon.
4. Add fennel slices and cook, stirring, until golden, about 2 minutes.
5. Stir in lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Cook until fennel is crisp-tender.
6. Add radicchio pieces and sauté over moderately high heat, tossing with two wooden spoons, just until radicchio is wilted and tender.
7. Return the pine nuts to the skillet and season with salt and pepper.
8. Yield: 2 servings
